scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w api" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @consultor/api-types && npm run build -w @consultor/connectors
scripts.build: npm run build -w @consultor/api-types && npm run build -w @consultor/connectors && npm run build -w api && npm run build -w web
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run build:packages && npm run test && npm run build
